description: oneAPI Data Analytics Library — High-performance ML algorithms optimized for Intel hardware

questions.text: How do I install oneDAL on Ubuntu and verify the installation works?
Show me a hello-world example: how do I train a simple linear regression model using oneDAL?
questions.persona: ML engineer trying oneDAL for the first time

questions.text: What are the main interfaces available in oneDAL? When should I use DAAL vs oneDAL C++ vs daal4py vs sklearnex?
questions.known_doc_issues: Documentation doesn't clearly explain the relationship between daal4py, sklearnex, and oneDAL C++ interfaces

questions.text: How do I patch scikit-learn with sklearnex to accelerate my existing code? Show a complete example.
questions.persona: Data scientist with existing sklearn pipeline

questions.text: Which scikit-learn algorithms are supported by sklearnex acceleration? Are there any limitations?
questions.known_doc_issues: GPU support matrix for sklearnex is not clearly documented

questions.text: How do I use oneDAL with Apache Spark for distributed machine learning?
questions.persona: Big data engineer building distributed ML pipeline

questions.text: How do I convert pandas DataFrames and numpy arrays to oneDAL tables? Show both homogen and SOA table examples.
What's the difference between daal4py and sklearnex? When should I use each?
questions.known_doc_issues: Migration path from daal4py to sklearnex is unclear

questions.text: How do I use oneDAL algorithms from C++ with DPC++/SYCL for GPU acceleration?
How do I enable GPU offload for oneDAL algorithms? Show configuration for both sklearnex and daal4py.
questions.known_doc_issues: GPU support varies by algorithm but documentation doesn't provide a clear matrix

questions.text: What's the optimal batch size for oneDAL algorithms? How does batch vs online vs distributed mode affect performance?
How do I control threading and CPU affinity for oneDAL algorithms?
What's the difference between homogeneous and SOA (struct-of-arrays) table layout? Which is faster for what workloads?
How do I benchmark and profile oneDAL algorithm performance? What metrics should I track?
My sklearnex.patch_sklearn() call doesn't accelerate my code. How do I debug which algorithms are actually being patched?
questions.known_doc_issues: Patching documentation is scattered across multiple pages

questions.text: I'm getting different accuracy results between scikit-learn and sklearnex. Is this expected? How do I investigate?
My oneDAL training is running out of memory. How do I use online learning mode to process data in chunks?
questions.known_doc_issues: Online learning API documentation is minimal and lacks examples

questions.text: GPU acceleration isn't working. How do I diagnose GPU device selection and offload issues?
I'm seeing crashes when using oneDAL with multiple threads. How do I debug race conditions and thread safety issues?
What are the different table types in oneDAL? Explain homogen_table, soa_table, and how to use table accessors.
How do I configure algorithm parameters for K-Means clustering? Show both training and inference configuration.
What's the difference between training and inference API in oneDAL? Show a complete workflow for decision forest.
How do I use PCA for dimensionality reduction? Show parameter configuration and accessing explained variance.
I'm migrating from Intel DAAL to oneDAL. What are the breaking API changes I need to handle?
questions.known_doc_issues: DAAL to oneDAL migration guide is incomplete

questions.text: How do I migrate from daal4py to sklearnex? Are there breaking changes in the Python API?
questions.known_doc_issues: daal4py to sklearnex migration documentation is missing

questions.text: Which oneDAL algorithms are deprecated? What are the recommended replacements?
